html:
Exclusive to:

The Poison Balm is a character-exclusive item craftable only by Wormwood in the Don't Starve: Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Green Thumb Tab and requires a Living Log and a Venom Gland to craft. Similar to the Anti Venom, it is used to remove the effects of Poison.

Each Poison Balm can only be used once, and is consumed when used even while not currently poisoned.

Gallery

  • Concept art of Poison Balm (left center) from Rhymes With Play #241.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Exclusive to:
Poison Balm
"The excruciating pain means it's working."
×1 ×1 ()
Tab
Tier
Always available
40
Perk
Cures Poison.
"poisonbalm"
“I do love not being poisoned.”
–Wilson
“I actually kinda like that burning feeling.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang does not fear poison! But will take just in case!”
–Wolfgang
“In case I don't want to succumb to poison. Unlikely.”
–Wendy
“ORGANIC POISON EXTRACTOR”
–WX-78
“A natural antidote for most venoms.”
–Wickerbottom
“I really like not bein' poisoned.”
–Woodie
“It's almost as bad as the poison.”
–Maxwell
“I should keep this on hand, in case I find myself poisoned.”
–Wagstaff
“Defense against poison.”
–Wigfrid
“It's icky, but it helps us when we feel sick.”
–Webber
“Getting poisoned is such a bummer.”
–Walani
“I fear that it tastes as terrible as it smells.”
–Warly
“Aye, that'll take the sting out.”
–Woodlegs
“IT SOOTHEST THE OUCHIES OF POIS'NINGS”
–Wilba
“Takes away sick”
–Wormwood
“Handy!”
–Wheeler
The Poison Balm is a character-exclusive item craftable only by Wormwood in the Don't Starve: Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Green Thumb Tab and requires a Living Log and a Venom Gland to craft. Similar to the Anti Venom, it is used to remove the effects of Poison.
Each Poison Balm can only be used once, and is consumed when used even while not currently poisoned.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Poison Balm là một vật phẩm độc quyền dành cho nhân vật chỉ có Wormwood có thể chế tạo trong Don't Starve: Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Ngón Tay Cái Màu Xanh Lá Cây và cần có Gỗ Sống và Tuyến Nọc Độc để chế tạo. Tương tự như Anti Venom, nó được sử dụng để loại bỏ tác dụng của Poison.

The '''Poison Balm''' is a [[character]]-exclusive [[Items|item]] craftable only by [[Wormwood]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Green Thumb Tab]] and requires a [[Living Log]] and a [[Venom Gland]] to craft. Similar to the [[Anti Venom]], it is used to remove the effects of [[Poison]].

Each Poison Balm can only be used once, and is consumed when used even while not currently poisoned.
